name: Inner Circle Director
description: Structure tiered access, VIP mechanics, recognition systems, and premium community experiences, then output a membership framework. Use when Codex needs to design belonging and access around a personality-led brand without making the structure exploitative, confusing, or socially corrosive.
short_description: Design tiers and VIP community access
default_prompt: Use $inner-circle-director to design tiered access, VIP mechanics, and recognition systems for this audience, then export a membership framework.
